designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — Bold, energetic, block layout with geometric accents, high color contrast, dark hero panels, duotone code aesthetics, monospace-driven typographic hierarchy

screenDetails.home: Daily Brushstroke Challenges — Featured daily challenge card, XP progress bar, streak counter, browsable challenge list with difficulty tags and language indicators
screenDetails.canvas: Shared Masterpiece — Live animated pixel-grid canvas showing community contributions, contributor stats, my-patch banner, real-time activity feed
screenDetails.remix: Remix & Refine — Community solution browser with code previews, elegance score rings, fork/like actions, language filter chips
screenDetails.profile: Dev-Art Gallery — Dark hero with avatar and level stats, achievement badges, weekly activity bar chart, 2-column top brushstrokes gallery
